headline: Is Exxon Mobil’s (XOM) Support for Sable Offshore Revealing a New Approach to Legacy Liabilities?
summary: Sable Offshore Corp. previously amended its Senior Secured Term Loan Agreement with Exxon Mobil, extending the loan’s maturity to July 24, 2026 at the latest, while also securing a limited waiver of plug-and-abandonment (P&A) financial security obligations tied to a November 2022 purchase and sale agreement. In exchange for a US$30.00 million amendment fee and temporary relief from a US$25.00 million minimum liquidity covenant, Sable plans to resize and refinance its term loan and pursue...

headline: Exxon Mobil (XOM) Is Moving Its Legal Home To Texas In 2026
summary: Exxon Mobil (NYSE:XOM) plans to change its legal domicile from New Jersey to Texas. The move will take effect on July 1, 2026, through a new parent company, ExxonMobil Holdings Corporation. Shareholders have approved the redomiciliation, which will make ExxonMobil Holdings Corporation the new publicly traded parent. Exxon Mobil is one of the largest integrated oil and gas companies, with operations that span exploration, production, refining, and chemicals. For investors, the announced...

headline: Exxon Saves Billions, But Margins Still Cut In Half
summary: Management once built its transformation story on massive cost discipline — and it's still telling it, louder than ever. Yet as profit margins fall by nearly half, a harder question emerges: if record cost savings can't hold the line, how resilient is the "transformed" company really.
